title: Fix test suite: replace AGPL oracle with RFC vectors
description: The original tests/cross_validate.rs uses stoa-sieve (AGPL) as oracle. Remove it. Keep the 32 unit tests in src/lib.rs that have independent expected values. Add integration tests using RFC 5228 Appendix A scripts, RFC 5229 §5 variable examples, and hand-traced SieveAction outputs. Never derive test vectors from the code under test.
